items.name: Signature Sausage Roll
items.description: Golden puff pastry packed with our own seasoned sausage mix, baked fresh in house every morning.

items.name: Veggie Vibe Tart
items.description: A crisp shortcrust tart filled with roasted seasonal vegetables and a light herb cream.

items.name: Homemade Soup served with Cheese Toastie
items.description: A warming bowl of freshly made soup paired with a golden buttered cheese toastie on the side.

items.name: Cheddar & Tomato
items.description: Melted mature cheddar and ripe tomato pressed in a toasted panini.

items.description: Thick-cut roast ham and cheddar melted together in a warm toasted panini.

items.description: Creamy tuna and melted cheddar in a toasted panini — a cafe classic.

items.description: A soft bap filled with mature cheddar, sliced onion, tomato, and crisp lettuce.

items.name: Roast Ham, Tomato, Lettuce

items.name: BLT

items.name: Coronation Chicken & Tomato
items.description: tender chicken in a lightly spiced coronation sauce with tomato, served in a fresh baguette.

items.name: Americano
items.description: A long black coffee with a smooth, clean finish.

items.name: Cappuccino
items.description: Equal parts espresso, steamed milk, and thick velvet foam.

items.name: Babyccino
items.description: Warm frothy milk — a little cup of cosy for the small ones.

items.name: Espresso

items.name: Double Espresso
items.description: Two shots pulled together for a bolder, richer hit.

items.description: Rich espresso blended with chocolate and steamed milk.

items.name: Hot Chocolate
items.description: Creamy classic hot chocolate made with quality cocoa and steamed milk.

items.description: Our classic hot chocolate topped with squirty cream and a dusting of cocoa.

items.name: Terry's Orange Hot Chocolate
items.description: A velvety hot chocolate with a hint of zesty orange — an indulgent treat.

items.name: Caramel Hot Chocolate
items.description: Smooth hot chocolate swirled with rich caramel for a sweet warming drink.

items.name: English Tea
items.description: A classic pot of English breakfast tea, served just as you like it.

items.name: Organic Green Tea
items.description: A light, clean organic green tea with natural antioxidants.

items.name: Lemon & Honey
items.description: Soothing herbal infusion of lemon and honey — a gentle favourite.

items.name: Pomegranate
items.description: Fruity pomegranate tea with a vibrant, tangy character.

items.name: Ginger & Peach
items.description: A warming blend of spicy ginger and sweet peachy notes.

items.description: A calming organic lemon balm tea, gently aromatic and naturally relaxing.

items.name: Orange Black Tea
items.description: Classic black tea brightened with a natural orange citrus flavour.

items.description: Bold black tea with a tart cranberry twist for a refreshing brew.

items.name: Alternative Milk
items.description: Swap to oat, almond, soy, or coconut milk in any drink.

items.name: Extra Coffee Shot
items.description: An additional espresso shot added to any coffee drink.

items.name: Squirty Cream
items.description: A generous swirl of whipped cream on top of any drink.

items.name: Scoop of Ice Cream
items.description: A scoop of classic vanilla ice cream alongside any dessert or drink.

items.name: Cans
items.description: Selection of chilled soft drink cans.

items.name: Water
items.description: Still bottled water.

items.name: J2O
items.description: A refreshing fruit juice blend, served chilled.

items.name: Kids Juice
items.description: A small juice carton perfect for little ones.

items.name: Ice Tea

items.name: Watermelon Lemonade
items.description: Fresh lemonade blended with juicy watermelon for a fruity summer sip.

items.name: Pink Lemonade
items.description: A blush lemonade with a sweet berry finish, served over ice.

items.name: Coffee & Cake
items.description: Any coffee paired with a slice of cake — available Monday to Friday.

items.description: A pot of your chosen tea with a slice of cake — available Monday to Friday.
